sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n56626" key="kentria/dai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κεντρ-ιάδαι</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">οἱ</gen>, <sense id="n56626.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">priests</tr_> at Athens, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">who drove</tr_> the ox to the altar <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with goads</tr_> at the Dipolia, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2034.tlg003:2:30" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Porph.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Abst.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.30</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
